headline: Is Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (TTWO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TTWO a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. on R. Dennis’s Substack by OppCost. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TTWO. Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc.’s share was trading at $207.69 as of March 16th. TTWO’s forward P/E was 23.04 according to Yahoo Finance. Take-Two Interactive […]
